textByHashes.5eecb30902e5e86c1d285198f451e4fbc57ffbc6: I'll be OK, the trolls only leave the plateau at nightfall. The guys are bringing a stretcher shortly.
textByHashes.a214e25cb6088b028c952797ff58ddd6a004d58b: It's my own fault really, I was having a walk and wandered past the danger sign. The trolls throw rocks down at any one who goes up the path!
textByHashes.992122c3d35d2aec14c7410725088c4fc1e1d8cb: Mihi ignosce. Cum homine de cane debeo congredi. (Excuse me. I've got to meet up with a man about a dog.)
textByHashes.76251f72c3f182f62d63eb9df53ba3e6f131a769: Errare humanum est. (Making mistakes is human.)
textByHashes.d98867afbc8c8f10bce7f021a6e327277ff1dea6: Die dulci freure. (Have a nice day.)
textByHashes.844118a22aa6841b6724e9005363144e607922b6: Te audire non possum. Musa sapientum fixa est in aure. (I can't hear you. I have a banana stuck in my ear.)
textByHashes.7d899b8eae326d92fbd95bdbc03ecf4d6b6f77a7: Furnulum pani nolo. (I don't want a toaster.)
textByHashes.b2ede200dab67fa57b897858f18c9afd70b18580: Utinam barbari spatium proprium tuum invadant! (May barbarians invade your personal space!)
textByHashes.ca1432ee61b408c51308b2fae06c1b78a5de5b66: Quantum materiae materietur marmota monax si marmota monax materiam possit materiari? (How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood?)
textByHashes.494074d9c7cadf1b91bd7b21f378610683c9f6fb: Sona si Latine loqueris. (Honk if you speak Latin.)
textByHashes.37d0a8be392e45e9d58c0a283573e0cd990fab0f: Nemo dat quod non habet. (No one gives what he does not have.)
textByHashes.473d2f7b33f3fb4c2e0b7e0cb005044b381fdb47: Ne auderis delere orbem rigidum meum! (Ne auderis delere orbem rigidum meum!)
textByHashes.cbe9fd8f436eaa5f9b1d3c28b78767d3d7e9d2b5: Da mihi sis bubulae frustum assae, solana tuberosa in modo gallico fricta, ac quassum lactatum coagulatum crassum. (Give me a hamburger, french fries, and a thick shake.)
textByHashes.d4820ea4e3f44254085cc387692d4d88c102af79: Cogito ergo sum. (I think, therefore I am.)
textByHashes.6d31f8eba31321efcf8d550a03d24776b48eb182: Di! Ecce hora! Uxor mea me necabit! (Oh gods! Look at the time! My wife will kill me!)
textByHashes.c49a1fe03693799ead1792cbe4bb62fe559f19ab: Latine loqui coactus sum. (I am compulsed to speak Latin.)
textByHashes.4e0febc6d67f97d58ac6cdc7f9487888ddb6bcfb: Cave ne ante ullas catapultas ambules. (Beware not to walk in front of any catapults.)
textByHashes.442fcc20d4588d201abc47e169f3b79846e16836: Noli me vocare, ego te vocabo. (I don't want you to call me, I'll call you.)
textByHashes.5b581619633203c3348b8a8c66b4f803d2079bc0: Meliora cogito. (I strive for the best.)
textByHashes.da6bbba7a53a95741926fe63902d8294d1f9276e: Braccae tuae aperiuntur. (Your fly is open.)
textByHashes.930636e0c197e1a7ef21bb87028d8dd5f2ccbedf: I've been posted here to guard this chasm.
textByHashes.99f855cc81304af5968df3cac7536dbd39898e8d: Not great. There's constant bursts of hot air, demon roars and strange lights coming from inside.
textByHashes.422b044eb5ed44f05cfeacc9ba26ca48305493d4: And then there's the cultists. They just climb out like it's normal to be down there. Try to talk to you like it's business as usual.
textByHashes.1ff106914832898cb715dda55db25a16312ef414: Indefinitely. We don't know what the cult is up to and we don't want to be caught unprepared.
textByHashes.86c99253c4c874e7efe65155bb39a439c469a92a: No. I signed up to to protect Kourend, even if that means standing outside of a demon nest. Besides, it's not like any demons have come out of it yet.
textByHashes.c9ddbfaf5cfcc9f83a8074f7b23938f3fc88b22e: What do you want? Are you with those cultists?
textByHashes.30450b502671ceed19a92d4d2fa75130ed216e23: Good. I've had enough of their games.
textByHashes.0d90a58698da7b34114b048c3d65ea31e08fd80f: They start off polite, but before you know it, they're trying to get you to agree to something.
textByHashes.f379dcc8878c73e7faf8c1dcad9ec35217b5ce41: They're not fooling me though. The next one that crosses me is going to regret it!
textByHashes.6bea8dc28440dde8751a4637b96968d3a1065bd8: Usually they want you to follow them somewhere private. Some of the bolder ones try to get you to join them inside the chasm.
textByHashes.22fa8df8a51746e6bfd93f2f6fa8c3f662243731: If it were up to me, we'd launch a sortie right now. See how they like it if we come down on our own terms.
textByHashes.4dd589a0aec032d0cd3d2e26d320fe08bb3e89cb: I am. If you ask me we should be out fighting lizardmen. That means we need to go on the offensive and wrap this chasm business up.
textByHashes.315afae79390804f27a4b26ceb8e5e0255995f87: You'd be right. The lieutenant is too cautious and the rest are too timid. The way some of them speak you'd think they had demon families.
textByHashes.58322ac9d83b246162f6a28a58fb48df4e830984: If you see any cultists lurking around, let me know.
textByHashes.d5753e3fbcc6d8820beed02edf94fe10b2119adc: I might as well be if we're going to continue this performance.
textByHashes.8686057b59392a2574b1afe0b165009305c6a9bd: There are no demons coming out of this chasm. If there were, we wouldn't last long.
textByHashes.a22f2b1cff4bd59d2d8ac848dde9ce9ddd24e9b3: Demons don't die the same way we do. We could hold back a few of them, but not an endless stream.
textByHashes.04e6d8d495618516739775d36cbdb2c851b822a5: I do, which means I know that guarding the chasm is a pointless endeavour. Not that the lieutenant cares what I think.
textByHashes.f49ecacd72acf6092f00558f81b0dfa89f1d8d75: Launching an attack into the chasm would also be pointless. That leaves us with only one other option.
textByHashes.8a2e8c1d620bea4588c0fdd41ef5106e2d832418: No. We should talk to them. Try to reach an understanding.
textByHashes.361c2213e3c92779840e7fc7209875eb61f3cd22: If you have a better idea, go ahead.
textByHashes.ce9bc7e9844f1012844f4dbe93242a462608d550: No. If they wanted to, Yama and his demons could overrun this little squad.
textByHashes.a07cbd6a3069667f97c8162e8127a160b0a3a95b: The fact they haven't means they're probably not interested in doing so. As a matter of fact, they seem quite polite.
textByHashes.d6f153486defba631696b3dfc26e9f9c415d6aad: I didn't say that, But there's evidence to suggest that Yama and his cult can be reasoned with.
textByHashes.f72c3ba17346bad4e086ddc696a090197c715f38: If Lord Shayzien is interested in diffusing the threat, he should consider trying to reach an agreement with them.
textByHashes.20bb288cf0dd978d4b453014ec3fca2aebca7c32: Interesting. You're quite the worldly fellow. Perhaps King Hosidius would make a more level headed negotiator. Maybe you could talk to him?
textByHashes.f19c0e7afc8e0ff45375ec495e5b1c0f30d0d82b: The Shayzien records say you've killed lizardmen since they began tracking your kills.
textByHashes.6090605a4f2eca916cd5c82b6f2c29293a27423a: The Shayzien records say you've killed lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. were lizardman shamans.
textByHashes.b5d301e19430062ef686c37041d49edf5a15b65a: Are you here to fight the lizardmen? Be careful - they're fierce!
textByHashes.745d5ce6ec84163fb4e67f701b982d986be45e19: The lizardmen are the bane of Kourend. I'm not much for history, but the Shayzien Army have been fighting them off for as long as anyone can remember.
textByHashes.00b4e66b102098da24e5e6230a8b3d00c0408e79: They can be aggressive, and they've got something nasty in their bite that can make you pretty ill.
textByHashes.1c45bee4bf6994ab400e57d1be7aa6bb2d95582a: I got a bite from a lizardman. I'm all cured, but I'm not going down there again until I feel stronger, otherwise I'll be no use in the fight.
textByHashes.bb5e84d4ce2eced485eae716d8c0585fec3b129a: The Shayzien records say you've killed lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. were lizardman shamans.
textByHashes.13ad0cb98f8973ec6492c0b866b3d1f42e5fa82e: I see no adventurers in the canyon to the east.
textByHashes.a9b816a0b691692da52dc747973be2f098795303: I see no adventurers in the canyon to the west.
textByHashes.d89c21267093bbf3cf8905190d0210bde745a073: Hello, are you interested in our agility training courses?
textByHashes.80d32d1e5efcf887ed41a912a8df087c4898db31: Nothing is difficult for a Shayzien soldier. If you do the training every day, you can be as good as us.
textByHashes.4fd1ce2692d86ebc3f01bcfeac3a1b2ed3d89108: Fair enough. Feel free to give it a go if you change your mind.
textByHashes.ac25bc4c287bf481e99c0f43bf895ef27b984d52: Hi, I've seen your moves on the agility course, well done!
textByHashes.989830d932a623ea645e2f8d639c75b320a50445: Do you want to know more about how you've been doing?
textByHashes.afe1072ac90c21d6460dde1052cc8008d9cc23b3: You've not completed any laps of our basic agility course yet. There's been completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.3f0e6b9f546076cbb00aab09d6bb4607a2c4d289: You've completed 1 lap of our basic agility course with a lap time of . There's been global completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.95d48103eb99372c6c4c3887614ddaa81f88c7c7: You've completed laps of our basic agility course with a best time of . There's been global completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.88680e0a54d9979d690bf15169065bce80265547: You've not completed any laps of our advanced agility course yet. There's been completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.4c9e9bb0f3db737fc2410ef71fe392ce116eb429: You've completed 1 lap of our advanced agility course with a lap time of . There's been global completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.8c2b2285c6edf2262b20585ebd11e721c5a54ea5: You've completed laps of our advanced course with a best time of . There's been global completions and the global best time is .
textByHashes.a005dcb3b32602e0682f81344ee1e654550b860e: We've just finished our first duties in the Lizardman Canyon. A few drinks at the Cloak and Stagger to celebrate is always traditional.
